tickets.message: Hi, I'm checking on the status of my order #NOVA1234. It's been 5 days since I placed the order for the Luxe Serum and I still haven't received any updates on shipping.
I need to return the Misty Makeup Palette I bought last week. The colors don't match my skin tone as expected. My order number is #NOVA5678. Can you please assist me with the return process?
What's the difference between the Day Glow Moisturizer and the Night Repair Cream? I have dry skin and I'm looking for a product that will provide long-lasting hydration.
I'm allergic to parabens. Can you please tell me if the Nova Shampoo contains any parabens? I want to make sure it's safe for me to use.

I'm interested in buying the Velvet Dress, but I'm not sure what size to get. I'm usually a medium, but I've heard that Nova's dresses run a bit small. Can you please provide me with the measurements for each size?

I'm extremely disappointed with the quality of the Nova Hair Mask. It's supposed to be sulfate-free, but it's made my hair feel dry and stripped of its natural oils. I demand a refund and a replacement with a better product.
Hey, just wanted to check in on my order #NOVA9012. I ordered the Nova Eyeshadow Palette and the shipping estimate said 3-5 business days, but it's been 7 days and I still haven't received it.
I received my order #NOVA3456, but the Nova Lipstick is the wrong shade. I ordered 'Blush' but got 'Ruby' instead. Can you please help me exchange it for the correct shade?
I'm looking for a new foundation that matches my skin tone. I have oily skin and I'm looking for something that will control shine and last all day. Can you recommend any products from Nova?
Does the Nova Face Cream contain any fragrances or dyes? I have sensitive skin and I need to avoid products with harsh ingredients.
I'm trying to buy the Nova Jeans, but I'm not sure what size to get. I'm a 28 in most brands, but I've never shopped at Nova before. Can you please provide me with a size chart?

I'm so frustrated with the customer service at Nova. I've been trying to contact you for weeks about my missing order #NOVA1111, and no one has gotten back to me. I demand a refund and a personal apology from the CEO.
I saw a promo code on Instagram for 15% off all orders over $50. Can you please tell me if the code 'NOVA15' is still valid? I want to use it on my next purchase.

Hi, I'm checking on the status of my order #NOVA7890. I ordered the Nova Watch and it was supposed to arrive yesterday, but it still hasn't arrived. Can you please look into this and let me know what's going on?
I need to cancel my order #NOVA4567. I just realized that I accidentally ordered two of the same product, and I only need one. Can you please cancel the order and refund me as soon as possible?
